title: July 8th, 2022
body:
lyrics

my real estate's expensive
stack bricks in every space i penned in
act rich cuz that's how i'm spending my time
pay attention when i'm trying
work in tension when i rhyme
skirting edges define lines without fences
walk a lot cuz my lot ain't legit if i can't leg it
talk a lot cuz it ain't a words worth until i said it
off the top i'm a legend
map, compass, and heading
back, frontwards, and present
wrapped up in the moment
bowed ripped off i'm open
paper flappin the wind blowing
i'm flaggin but still going
bag empty cuz i'm holding everything i own gently
ready to let it go when i'm done renting my home
